user.title: Connect to LLM
user.description:
Enter the URL of your OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint.

Ollama default: http://localhost:11434

AutoMagic will auto-detect the best available model for the first AI service. You can add more services later with Home Assistant's Add service button.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to LLM endpoint. Check the URL and ensure the server is running.
error.invalid_api_key: OpenAI rejected that API key. Paste a valid key and try again.
error.missing_api_key: Paste an OpenAI API key to continue.
error.no_models: Connected but no models found. Install a model first (e.g. ollama pull qwen2.5:7b).

abort.already_exists: That AI service is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the AI service. Check the details and try again.
error.invalid_api_key: OpenAI rejected that API key. Paste a valid key and try again.
error.missing_api_key: Paste an OpenAI API key to continue.
error.no_models: Connected but no models were found. Install a model first or enter the model name manually.

user.title: Add Service
user.description: Choose whether to add a Local LLM or an OpenAI API key.

custom_service.title: Add Local LLM
custom_service.description: Add another local endpoint/model combination that AutoMagic can send prompts to.

openai_service.title: Add OpenAI Key
openai_service.description: Add an OpenAI service by pasting an API key. AutoMagic uses OpenAI's hosted endpoint automatically, so no model URL is needed. Choose either gpt-4o-mini or gpt-4o.
